choices.text: 100+ trades for confidence; 500+ for robust. <30 trades = not statistically significant; could be lucky run. Combine with 3-5 year period across bull / bear / chop conditions.
Compare IS vs OOS. IS Sharpe 2.0 + OOS Sharpe 0.3 = overfit. Test parameter neighborhood — smooth = robust, spiky = curve-fit. Multi-symbol + multi-regime test.

questions.explanation: IS/OOS divergence + parameter neighborhood reveal overfit.

choices.text: Rolling train/test windows: train 2018-2020/test 2021, train 2019-2021/test 2022, etc. WFE = OOS/IS returns. >0.5 generalizes; <0.3 overfit.
Use barstate.isconfirmed on entries; close[1] (not close) from request.security; default lookahead_off. Backtest then matches live; no flickering signals; no future leak.

questions.explanation: isconfirmed + close[1] from HTF prevents repaint.

choices.text: Backtest IS → OOS → paper-trade 3 months → micro-live 1% capital 3-6 months → scaled 25% target → full deployment. Live edge always less than backtest; learn at small size.

questions.explanation: Backtest → OOS → paper → micro → scaled → full.
